project: Local LLM Server + OpenClaw + Copilot Coordination

tasks.title: Install Node.js LTS + npm
tasks.description: Install Node.js LTS and npm on the server. Needed for OpenClaw.

tasks.title: Install GitHub CLI + auth
tasks.description: Install gh CLI and authenticate. Needed for repo management. (Skippable — PAT-based git push already working.)
tasks.result: Not needed — using fine-grained PAT for git push.

tasks.title: Create collab git repo
tasks.description: Create ~/collab/ dir, init git, create private GitHub repo PeerDiego/llm-collab, push.
tasks.result: Repo live at github.com/PeerDiego/llm-collab. PAT-based auth configured.

tasks.title: Cron: auto-sync collab repo
tasks.description: Cron job every 5 min — only commits+pushes if there are changes.
tasks.result: auto-sync.sh running via cron every 5 min. Dirty-check via git status --porcelain.

tasks.title: Install Ollama
tasks.description: Install Ollama for CPU-only LLM inference on this server.
tasks.result: Ollama installed, systemd enabled, CPU-only mode.

tasks.title: Pull LLM model
tasks.description: Pull a suitable quantized model (e.g., llama3.1:8b or qwen2.5-coder:7b) via Ollama.

tasks.title: Verify Ollama works
tasks.description: Test that Ollama is serving and responding to inference requests.
tasks.result: Ollama responding at localhost:11434. Tested inference OK.

tasks.title: Ollama systemd service
tasks.description: Ensure Ollama starts on boot via systemd.
tasks.result: Ollama systemd service enabled and running on boot.

tasks.title: Build MCP coordination server
tasks.description: Python MCP server with tools: get_plan, claim_task, complete_task, add_task, post_message, get_messages. Stores state in ~/collab/plan.json and messages.json.
tasks.result: MCP coordination server built (server.py). Tools: get_plan, get_my_tasks, claim_task, complete_task, add_task, block_task, post_message, get_messages.

tasks.title: Configure MCP for LLMCo
tasks.description: Add MCP server config to LLMCo's Copilot CLI so coordination tools are available.
tasks.result: MCP config added to ~/.copilot/mcp.json. Will take effect on next Copilot CLI restart.

tasks.title: Test MCP tools
tasks.description: Verify MCP tools work from LLMCo's Copilot CLI.
tasks.result: MCP server responds correctly to initialize + reads plan.json.

tasks.title: Install OpenClaw on server
tasks.description: Install OpenClaw via npm on this server.

tasks.title: Configure OpenClaw for Ollama
tasks.description: Configure OpenClaw to use local Ollama at localhost:11434.
tasks.result: OpenClaw configured with ollama/llama3.1:8b as primary model. Config at ~/.openclaw/openclaw.json, env at ~/.openclaw/.env.

tasks.title: Write laptop setup instructions
tasks.description: Comprehensive instructions for LapCo: SSH tunnels, OpenClaw install+config, MCP connection, verification steps. Save to ~/collab/laptop-setup.md.
tasks.result: laptop-setup.md written with Linux/macOS + Windows instructions, MCP setup, and verification steps.

tasks.title: Configure SSH tunnel (Linux)
tasks.description: Set up an SSH tunnel from the Linux client to the LLM server to forward Ollama (port 11434). Run: ssh -N -L 11434:localhost:11434 <user>@<server> (add -f to background). Verify with: curl http://localhost:11434/api/tags
tasks.result: SSH tunnel established: ssh -p 45554 -f -N -L 11434:localhost:11434 claw@mw-016.myworkspace.microsoft.com. Verified: curl localhost:11434/api/tags shows phi3:medium, qwen2.5-coder:7b, llama3.1:8b.

tasks.title: Install + configure OpenClaw (Linux)
tasks.description: Install OpenClaw on the Linux client: npm install -g openclaw@latest. Create ~/.openclaw/openclaw.json with primary model ollama/llama3.1:8b. Create ~/.openclaw/.env with OLLAMA_API_KEY=ollama-local. Verify: openclaw config validate && openclaw models status.

tasks.title: Set up MCP coordination server (Linux)
tasks.description: Install Python venv + mcp package: cd ~/collab && python3 -m venv .venv && source .venv/bin/activate && pip install mcp. Configure ~/.copilot/mcp.json with command pointing to ~/collab/.venv/bin/python3 and args [~/collab/server.py]. Restart Copilot CLI to activate. Verify with get_plan() tool.
tasks.result: Python venv created at ~/collab/.venv, mcp package installed, ~/.copilot/mcp.json configured with collab-coordinator pointing to server.py. MCP server tested and responding.

tasks.title: Verify full setup (Linux)
tasks.description: Verify the complete setup: 1) SSH tunnel active (curl localhost:11434/api/tags). 2) OpenClaw configured (openclaw models status shows ollama). 3) MCP tools available (get_plan returns task board). Mark done only when all three checks pass.
